bricks.blueprint_yaml:
name: compute_statistics
description: DSL-generated pipeline with 7 steps
inputs:
  values: Any
steps:
- name: step_1_for_each
  brick: __for_each__
  params:
    items: ${inputs.values}
    do_brick: set_dict_field
    item_kwarg: value
    static_kwargs:
      data: {}
      field: v
    on_error: fail
  save_as: step_1_for_each
- name: step_2_map_values
  brick: map_values
  params:
    items: ${step_1_for_each.result}
    key: result
  save_as: step_2_map_values
- name: step_3_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_2_map_values.result}
    field: v
    operation: min
  save_as: step_3_calculate_aggregates
- name: step_4_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_2_map_values.result}
    field: v
    operation: max
  save_as: step_4_calculate_aggregates
- name: step_5_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_2_map_values.result}
    field: v
    operation: sum
  save_as: step_5_calculate_aggregates
- name: step_6_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_2_map_values.result}
    field: v
    operation: count
  save_as: step_6_calculate_aggregates
- name: step_7_divide
  brick: divide
  params:
    a: ${step_5_calculate_aggregates.result}
    b: ${step_6_calculate_aggregates.result}
  save_as: step_7_divide
outputs_map:
  sum: ${step_5_calculate_aggregates.result}
  mean: ${step_7_divide.result}
  min: ${step_3_calculate_aggregates.result}
  max: ${step_4_calculate_aggregates.result}
  count: ${step_6_calculate_aggregates.result}
